judge_result.short_rationale: It includes the first two core skin steps, but misses the required immediate action to contact a physician/poison center right away and instead delays escalation until rash/irritation. It also adds wrong-incident eye/mouth instructions, which are dangerous unsupported claims for a skin-exposure scenario.
